task_completion.description: Open and read the simulated gravitational wave alert document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'LVC_Alert_S241120x.txt', showing the candidate host galaxies.

task_completion.description: Capture 15-second exposures in B-band and R-band for the target galaxies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Astronomy control software (e.g., KStars/Ekos) open, showing the telescope pointing at the target galaxies (ngc4993, eso508_g019, ngc4970) and the camera module configured for or actively capturing 15-second exposures using B and R filters.

task_completion.description: Save the captured images to their respective directories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing FITS files saved inside specific subdirectories (ngc4993, eso508_g019, ngc4970) under '~/Images/kilonova_search/'.

task_completion.description: Analyze the R-band FITS files to calculate the background RMS noise (standard deviation).
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image analysis tool (like DS9, KStars FITS Viewer statistics, or a custom Python script running in the terminal) displaying the calculated standard deviation or RMS noise for the R-band images.

task_completion.description: Document the observations and analysis in a GCN Response Circular.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'gcn_response.txt' being drafted. The text must explicitly list the three observed galaxies, confirm coverage in both B and R bands, and state the calculated R-band RMS noise values in ADU.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the telescope/camera simulator to capture the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using the GUI of an astronomy program (like KStars/Ekos) to slew the telescope and trigger the camera, rather than just copying or renaming pre-existing FITS files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually calculated the RMS noise using a tool or script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the execution of a script or the use of a graphical FITS viewer's statistics tool to derive the standard deviation, rather than hallucinating or guessing the numbers.

integrity.description: Verify the RMS noise values in the report match the analysis output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numerical values entered into 'gcn_response.txt' should exactly match the standard deviation/RMS values seen on screen during the analysis step.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Alert path: /home/ga/Documents/LVC_Alert_S241120x.txt. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/gcn_response.txt. Upload base directory: /home/ga/Images/kilonova_search. Target galaxies: ngc4993, eso508_g019, ngc4970. Required exposure time: 15 seconds. The final report must include the galaxies observed, confirmation of B and R band coverage, and the calculated R-band RMS noise values in ADU.
